name: test_reasoning_parser_method_signatures
descriptionHtml:
Verify ReasoningParser has extract_reasoning_streaming and is_reasoning_end_streaming.

    prepost.py calls both during streaming post-processing to separate
    reasoning tokens from content tokens.

retries.name: test_reasoning_parser_method_signatures
retries.description:

        is_reasoning_end_streaming.

        prepost.py calls both during streaming post-processing to separate
